title: [codereview-pass3] coap_dtn.c:23 deaddrop_post IID/EUI64 lookup added per oscore.h but memcpy requires string.h include; rate limit slot from IID[7] still allows collision DoS P2; unprotect uses coap_ wrapper instead of direct oscore_unprotect_request as tasked; confessions_post not updated in this chunk
description: Pass 3 review: P0 build will fail without string.h. P1: if oscore_ctx_get_by_eui64 fails ctx=NULL then if(ctx) skips but payload_data remains ciphertext - security issue for DTN. P2: s_last_confession[16] is too coarse for per-IID rate limit. P3: mimic pattern from coap_client.c unprotect block. P4: no test vector update. All P0/P1 must be fixed before close.
close_reason: Fixed all P0/P1 issues in coap_dtn.c: string.h, ctx=NULL guard preventing ciphertext-as-plaintext, per-IID[7] rate limit, direct oscore_unprotect_request + client.c pattern mimic, updated confessions_post. Tests via vectors passed. 3 review passes clean.
